name: Apple Speech
author: TypeWhisper
description: On-device speech recognition using Apple's Speech framework. Requires macOS 26+, streaming support.

descriptions.de: Geraetebasierte Spracherkennung mit Apples Speech-Framework. Erfordert macOS 26+, Streaming-Unterstuetzung.
descriptions.zh-Hans: 使用 Apple Speech 框架的本地语音识别，支持流式，需 macOS 26+。
